description: A water resource manager is conducting an annual water audit to calculate the amount of non-revenue water (NRW) in the system.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total volume of water supplied into the distribution system over the past year.

expected_outcome.value: System computes the total volume of water produced.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the total volume of water billed to all customers over the same period.

expected_outcome.value: System computes the total volume of water sold.

nodes.task_description: Calculate the non-revenue water percentage by subtracting billed volume from supplied volume.

expected_outcome.value: System determines the water loss is 15%.

nodes.task_description: Benchmark the result against industry averages and recommend further action if the loss is high.

expected_outcome.value: System notes that 15% is above the industry average and recommends an expanded leak detection program.
